general_information.summary_of_changes_in_company_ownership_: In April 2020, the company underwent a minor restructuring of its shareholding pattern to facilitate a small round of internal equity infusion. The two original co-founders, Ms. Ananya Rao and Mr. Rohan Mehta, retained majority control, but each diluted 5% of their shareholding to a senior partner, Mr. Prakash Nair, who had been with the company since 2013 as Director of Operations. This change was formalized through an amendment to the shareholder agreement and updated with the Ministry of Corporate Affairs in India. There have been no changes in ultimate beneficial ownership, no external institutional investors, and no changes to the company’s registered name, CIN, or primary line of business. Apart from this internal reallocation, there have been no mergers, acquisitions, or divestitures in the last five years.
